visa_types.name: Business/work
visa_types.documents_required:
General documents: 
- Filled and signed application form
- 1 photo, a color photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations.
- Valid travel document: issued passport within the last 10 years, with expiry date exceeding the expiry date of the requested visa by a minimum of three months, and containing at least
                                                                            two empty pages. The copy of first page of the passport and Schengen visas for the last 3 years If the customer has the citizenship of a third country, the proof of legal residence
                                                                            in the Republic of Kazakhstan is presented in accordance with the law (original and copy).
- Business trip:
- The original invitation (a copy) from a firm or business partner on the company's official form with the seal and signature of the person in charge (whose name, position and contact details must also be specified). If the invitation is not written in English, Hungarian or Russian, it is translated into English.

- Employment information:
- evidence of employment, certificate of school attendance or proof of studying etc; for retired persons – proof of pension or other documents confirming employment. In letter
                                                                                    from work should be showed the employee's position and salary for the last three months. For individual entrepreneurs - Registration certificate and last tax statement,
                                                                                    bank statements.
- Order of business trip from Kazakhstan company or organization which is sending to business trip with following information: surname, name of customer and his position, purpose and
                                                                            terms of trip.
-  Documents proving sufficient funds to support the stay in Hungary:
- Bank certificate of the availability of cash at the rate of 65-70 euros per day for one person. Bank statements should be for 3 month.
- A northerly established sponsorship letter confirms the coverage of funds by sponsor (together with confirmation of the availability of the sponsor's funds and a copy of the
                                                                                    sponsor’s passport).
- Documents confirming marital status (copies of marriage certificate, certificate of birth of children e t.c.).
- Means of transportation and intention to return to the country of residence: reservation of return travel ticket for airplane/ train ; driver's license, technical passport, green
                                                                            card, contract with carrier - if travelling by car
- Proof of the purpose of stay in Hungary:
Confirmed or prepaid hotel reservation with surname and names of all customers; a document from the accommodation provider or any other relevant document indicating that accommodation
                                                                                is provided in accordance with the legislation of the Schengen member state 
- Medical insurance: insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital, treatment
                                                                            or death during the stay; must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit; minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- Copy of the passport, as well as copies of all used pages and visas.

- For minors: 
- Copy of certificate of birth
- Copy and original of the notarized agreement to leave the parents, in case one or both parents do not accompany the child
- Copies of passports of both of parents
- Copy of the accompanying person's valid visa in the provided cases
- Financial guarantees of one of the parents or legal guardians (sponsorship letter).
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Tourism/other Private Visits]
The following are exempt from visa fees upon customers:

- Children up to the age of 6
- Children from the age of 6 and below the age of 12 years shall pay fee of EUR 45 (payment accepted in Tenge 25 335 KZT ).
- The beneficiary of the visa facilitation bilateral agreement signed be the EU (Ukraine, Belarus, Moldova, Albania, Serbia, Macedonian, Bosnian, Montenegro, Herzegovina, Georgian, Armenian, Azerbaijan) shall pay EUR 35 (payment accepted in Tenge 19 705 KZT ).
- customers, who can confirm their Hungarian origin with documents and certificate issued by consular department of in according to the procedures established by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs
- customers who has the rights to citizenship in Hungary through relevant documents which can confirm this right;
- According to the decision of the Consular Division in exceptional cases for foreigners wishing to apply documents for visa to Hungary for the purpose of carrying out social, cultural activities, promoting the policy of cooperation, as well as for the development of other areas of public Humanitarian activities;
- Family members of EU/EAA nationals (European Economic Area)
VFS service charge:
Apart from the visa fee, VFS service charge in KZT
- VFS service charge needs to be paid in Tenge only 14 640 KZT.
- In case of refusal to issue a visa, the consular and service fee are not refundable.
Payment is accepted in the Visa Center cashier for cash and by card in tenge. Also we ask you to pay the fees without surrender.
ATTENTION!
To the calculation are accepted clean banknotes not damaged, not torn, not crumpled, without extraneous seals, notes, stains, punctures.
All fees and service charge listed above are non-refundable and may be paid in cash or by card, please note that you will be given official receipt for all the payments done at the Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.processing_time:
Applications for short-term visas are usually processed within 15 days of receipt of documents by the Consulate General of Hungary in Almaty, if all necessary documents are in order (not
                                                                        including the day of submission at the Visa Center). However, in some cases, consideration of documents may take significantly longer.
The Consulate General of Hungary in Almaty may request additional documents to make a decision if necessary. Please note that the provision of all the above documents does not guarantee
                                                                        the issuance of a visa.
Carefully read the information provided on the web site. This information will allow you to prepare your documents properly. This will reduce the chances that your application will be
                                                                        considered longer or rejected due to improper preparation of documents.

Overview
You need to apply for the relevant visa type if you enter Hungary with one of the following purposes.
- Members of official delegations
- Employees sent to business trips
- Individual entrepreneurs who need visas for business trips
- Drivers (international shipments, international passenger carrying operations)
- Members of train, refrigerating and locomotive crews
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
You need to apply for the relevant visa type if you enter Hungary with one of the following purposes.
- Members of official delegations
- Employees sent to business trips
- Individual entrepreneurs who need visas for business trips
- Drivers (international shipments, international passenger carrying operations)
- Members of train, refrigerating and locomotive crews

## Visa Fees

[Table:Tourism/other Private Visits]
The following are exempt from visa fees upon customers:

- Children up to the age of 6
- Children from the age of 6 and below the age of 12 years shall pay fee of EUR 45 (payment accepted in Tenge 25 335 KZT ).
- The beneficiary of the visa facilitation bilateral agreement signed be the EU (Ukraine, Belarus, Moldova, Albania, Serbia, Macedonian, Bosnian, Montenegro, Herzegovina, Georgian, Armenian, Azerbaijan) shall pay EUR 35 (payment accepted in Tenge 19 705 KZT ).
- customers, who can confirm their Hungarian origin with documents and certificate issued by consular department of in according to the procedures established by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs
- customers who has the rights to citizenship in Hungary through relevant documents which can confirm this right;
- According to the decision of the Consular Division in exceptional cases for foreigners wishing to apply documents for visa to Hungary for the purpose of carrying out social, cultural activities, promoting the policy of cooperation, as well as for the development of other areas of public Humanitarian activities;
- Family members of EU/EAA nationals (European Economic Area)
VFS service charge:
Apart from the visa fee, VFS service charge in KZT
- VFS service charge needs to be paid in Tenge only 14 640 KZT.
- In case of refusal to issue a visa, the consular and service fee are not refundable.
Payment is accepted in the Visa Center cashier for cash and by card in tenge. Also we ask you to pay the fees without surrender.
ATTENTION!
To the calculation are accepted clean banknotes not damaged, not torn, not crumpled, without extraneous seals, notes, stains, punctures.
All fees and service charge listed above are non-refundable and may be paid in cash or by card, please note that you will be given official receipt for all the payments done at the Visa Application Centre.

## Documents Required
General documents: 
- Filled and signed application form
- 1 photo, a color photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations.
- Valid travel document: issued passport within the last 10 years, with expiry date exceeding the expiry date of the requested visa by a minimum of three months, and containing at least
                                                                            two empty pages. The copy of first page of the passport and Schengen visas for the last 3 years If the customer has the citizenship of a third country, the proof of legal residence
                                                                            in the Republic of Kazakhstan is presented in accordance with the law (original and copy).
- Business trip:
- The original invitation (a copy) from a firm or business partner on the company's official form with the seal and signature of the person in charge (whose name, position and contact details must also be specified). If the invitation is not written in English, Hungarian or Russian, it is translated into English.

- Employment information:
- evidence of employment, certificate of school attendance or proof of studying etc; for retired persons – proof of pension or other documents confirming employment. In letter
                                                                                    from work should be showed the employee's position and salary for the last three months. For individual entrepreneurs - Registration certificate and last tax statement,
                                                                                    bank statements.
- Order of business trip from Kazakhstan company or organization which is sending to business trip with following information: surname, name of customer and his position, purpose and
                                                                            terms of trip.
-  Documents proving sufficient funds to support the stay in Hungary:
- Bank certificate of the availability of cash at the rate of 65-70 euros per day for one person. Bank statements should be for 3 month.
- A northerly established sponsorship letter confirms the coverage of funds by sponsor (together with confirmation of the availability of the sponsor's funds and a copy of the
                                                                                    sponsor’s passport).
- Documents confirming marital status (copies of marriage certificate, certificate of birth of children e t.c.).
- Means of transportation and intention to return to the country of residence: reservation of return travel ticket for airplane/ train ; driver's license, technical passport, green
                                                                            card, contract with carrier - if travelling by car
- Proof of the purpose of stay in Hungary:
Confirmed or prepaid hotel reservation with surname and names of all customers; a document from the accommodation provider or any other relevant document indicating that accommodation
                                                                                is provided in accordance with the legislation of the Schengen member state 
- Medical insurance: insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital, treatment
                                                                            or death during the stay; must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit; minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- Copy of the passport, as well as copies of all used pages and visas.

- For minors: 
- Copy of certificate of birth
- Copy and original of the notarized agreement to leave the parents, in case one or both parents do not accompany the child
- Copies of passports of both of parents
- Copy of the accompanying person's valid visa in the provided cases
- Financial guarantees of one of the parents or legal guardians (sponsorship letter).

## Visa Facilitation for family members of EU/EEA and Swiss Nationals
If you are a family member of an EU/EEA citizen (except Hungary) or Swiss citizen, your application will be processed quickly and free of charge, however, the service fee is applicable
                                                                        if the application is made at a visa service centre.
                                                                    
Family members under this category are:
- Spouse/partner/common law spouse
- The direct descendants (children) who are under the age of 21 or are dependents, and those of the spouse or partner.
- The dependent direct relatives in the ascending line (e.g. parents) and those of the spouse or partner.
Non-EU family member must include the following documents with their visa application:
- application form
- 1 passport sized photograph
- a valid passport and a hard copy of it
- a document proving family ties with the EU citizen (e.g. marriage certificate, birth certificate etc.) and dependency (if required)
- proof that the EU citizen is already living in the host country (if they are joining them)
- a declaration that the couple will travel together (if the family member will be accompanying the EU citizen)
* The European Union (EU) consists of 28 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta,
                                                                        Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden and the UK.
The European Economic Area (EEA) consists of 31 member states:
 Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta,
                                                                        Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and the United Kingdom.

## Photo Specifications
Customers are requested to submit their Application form in the new photo format, as explained below. 
General
- The photograph for each visa customer must be an un-mounted, full face photo, as displayed above
- The photograph must have been taken within the last six months.
Photo Size 
The photo for each visa customer submitted must measure:
- 35 mm * 45 mm with the head centered in the frame.
- The head (measured from the top of the hair to the bottom of the chin) should measure about 3 cms
Photo Appearance
- The photograph must be a full-face front view in which the visa customer is facing the camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70 – 80 percent of the photo area.
- The photograph MUST be in color and have only a white background. Photos with dark, busy, or patterned backgrounds will not be accepted.
- General, the customer's head, including both face and hair, should be shown from the crown of the head to the tip of the chin on top and bottom and from hairline side-to-side. It
                                                                            is preferable that ears be exposed.

## Processing Time
Applications for short-term visas are usually processed within 15 days of receipt of documents by the Consulate General of Hungary in Almaty, if all necessary documents are in order (not
                                                                        including the day of submission at the Visa Center). However, in some cases, consideration of documents may take significantly longer.
The Consulate General of Hungary in Almaty may request additional documents to make a decision if necessary. Please note that the provision of all the above documents does not guarantee
                                                                        the issuance of a visa.
Carefully read the information provided on the web site. This information will allow you to prepare your documents properly. This will reduce the chances that your application will be
                                                                        considered longer or rejected due to improper preparation of documents.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
You need to apply for the relevant visa type if you enter Hungary with one of the following purposes:
- Tourism
- Private visits (excluding visiting close relatives/family members/friends)

## Visa Fees

[Table:Tourism/other Private Visits]
The following are exempt from visa fees upon customers:

- Children up to the age of 6
- Children from the age of 6 and below the age of 12 years shall pay fee of EUR 45 (payment accepted in Tenge 25 335 KZT ).
- The beneficiary of the visa facilitation bilateral agreement signed be the EU (Ukraine, Belarus, Moldova, Albania, Serbia, Macedonian, Bosnian, Montenegro, Herzegovina, Georgian, Armenian, Azerbaijan) shall pay EUR 35 (payment accepted in Tenge 19 705 KZT ).
- customers, who can confirm their Hungarian origin with documents and certificate issued by consular department of in according to the procedures established by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs
- customers who has the rights to citizenship in Hungary through relevant documents which can confirm this right;
- According to the decision of the Consular Division in exceptional cases for foreigners wishing to apply documents for visa to Hungary for the purpose of carrying out social, cultural activities, promoting the policy of cooperation, as well as for the development of other areas of public Humanitarian activities;
- Family members of EU/EAA nationals (European Economic Area)
VFS service charge:
Apart from the visa fee, VFS service charge in KZT
- VFS service charge needs to be paid in Tenge only 14 640 KZT.
- In case of refusal to issue a visa, the consular and service fee are not refundable.
Payment is accepted in the Visa Center cashier for cash and by card in tenge. Also we ask you to pay the fees without surrender.
ATTENTION!
To the calculation are accepted clean banknotes not damaged, not torn, not crumpled, without extraneous seals, notes, stains, punctures.
All fees and service charge listed above are non-refundable and may be paid in cash or by card, please note that you will be given official receipt for all the payments done at the Visa Application Centre.

## Documents Required
General requirements for customers: 
- Filled and signed application form
- 1 photo, a color photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations.
- Valid travel document: issued passport within the last 10 years, with expiry date exceeding the expiry date of the requested visa by a minimum of three months, and containing at least
                                                                            two empty pages. The copy of first page of the passport and Schengen visas for the last 3 years If the customer has the citizenship of a third country, the proof of legal residence
                                                                            in the Republic of Kazakhstan is presented in accordance with the law (original and copy).
- Employment information:
- evidence of employment, certificate of school attendance or proof of studying etc; for retired persons – proof of pension or other documents confirming employment. In letter
                                                                                    from work should be showed the employee's position and salary for the last three months. For individual entrepreneurs - Registration certificate and last tax statement,
                                                                                    bank statements.
-  Documents proving sufficient funds to support the stay in Hungary:
- Bank certificate of the availability of cash at the rate of 65-70 euros per day for one person. Bank statements should be for 3 month.
- A northerly established sponsorship letter confirms the coverage of funds by sponsor (together with confirmation of the availability of the sponsor's funds and a copy of the
                                                                                    sponsor’s passport).
- Documents confirming marital status (copies of marriage certificate, certificate of birth of children e t.c.).
- Means of transportation and intention to return to the country of residence: reservation of return travel ticket for airplane/ train ; driver's license, technical passport, green
                                                                            card, contract with carrier - if travelling by car
- Proof of the purpose of stay in Hungary:
Confirmed or prepaid hotel reservation with surname and names of all customers; a document from the accommodation provider or any other
                                                                            relevant document indicating that accommodation is provided in accordance with the legislation of the Schengen member state
- Medical insurance: insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital, treatment
                                                                            or death during the stay; must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit; minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- For minors: 
- Copy of certificate of birth
- Copy and original of the notarized agreement to leave the parents, in case one or both parents do not accompany the child
- Copies of passports of both of parents
- Copy of the accompanying person's valid visa in the provided cases
- Financial guarantees of one of the parents or legal guardians (sponsorship letter).
Please note:

## Visa Facilitation for family members of EU/EEA and Swiss Nationals
If you are a family member of an EU/EEA citizen (except Hungary) or Swiss citizen, your application will be processed quickly and free of charge, however, the service fee is applicable
                                                                        if the application is made at a visa service centre.
                                                                    
Family members under this category are:
- Spouse/partner/common law spouse
- The direct descendants (children) who are under the age of 21 or are dependents, and those of the spouse or partner.
- The dependent direct relatives in the ascending line (e.g. parents) and those of the spouse or partner.
Non-EU family member must include the following documents with their visa application:
- application form
- 1 passport sized photograph
- a valid passport and a hard copy of it
- a document proving family ties with the EU citizen (e.g. marriage certificate, birth certificate etc.) and dependency (if required)
- proof that the EU citizen is already living in the host country (if they are joining them)
- a declaration that the couple will travel together (if the family member will be accompanying the EU citizen)
* The European Union (EU) consists of 28 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta,
                                                                        Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden and the UK.
The European Economic Area (EEA) consists of 31 member states:
 Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta,
                                                                        Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and the United Kingdom.

## Photo Specifications
Customers are requested to submit their Application form in the new photo format, as explained below. 
General
- The photograph for each visa customer must be an un-mounted, full face photo, as displayed above
- The photograph must have been taken within the last six months.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa customer submitted must measure:
- 35 mm * 45 mm with the head centered in the frame.
- The head (measured from the top of the hair to the bottom of the chin) should measure about 3 cms
Photo Appearance
- The photograph must be a full-face front view in which the visa customer is facing the camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70 – 80 percent of the photo area.
- The photograph MUST be in color and have only a white background. Photos with dark, busy, or patterned backgrounds will not be accepted.
- General, the customer's head, including both face and hair, should be shown from the crown of the head to the tip of the chin on top and bottom and from hairline side-to-side. It
                                                                            is preferable that ears be exposed.

## Processing Time
Applications for short-term visas are usually processed within 15 days of receipt of documents by the Consulate General of Hungary in Almaty, if all necessary documents are in order (not
                                                                        including the day of submission at the Visa Center). However, in some cases, consideration of documents may take significantly longer.
The Consulate General of Hungary in Almaty may request additional documents to make a decision if necessary. Please note that the provision of all the above documents does not guarantee
                                                                        the issuance of a visa.
Carefully read the information provided on the web site. This information will allow you to prepare your documents properly. This will reduce the chances that your application will be
                                                                        considered longer or rejected due to improper preparation of documents.

- 1 photo, a color photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations.
- Valid travel document: issued passport within the last 10 years, with expiry date exceeding the expiry date of the requested visa by a minimum of three months, and containing at least
                                                                            two empty pages. The copy of first page of the passport and Schengen visas for the last 3 years If the customer has the citizenship of a third country, the proof of legal residence
                                                                            in the Republic of Kazakhstan is presented in accordance with the law (original and copy).
- For patients:
- Conformation/referral from local medical facility, which shows need of medical care and also conformation from Hungarian clinic
- Confirmation of accommodation – in case if accommodation doesn’t showed in confirmation from medical organization
- Confirmation of the availability of funds to finance treatment, payment or prepayments.
- For accompanying persons:
- Confirmation from medical organization of need of medical care
- Confirmation of accommodation – in case if accommodation doesn’t showed in confirmation from medical organization
- In case if patient and accompanying person will apply separate – copy of passport and visa of patient
- Medical insurance: insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital, treatment
                                                                            or death during the stay; must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit; minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- Means of transportation and intention to return to the country of residence: reservation of return travel ticket for airplane/ train.
- Copy of the passport, as well as copies of all used pages and visas.

- For minors:
- Copy of certificate of birth
- Copy and original of the notarized agreement to leave the parents, in case one or both parents do not accompany the child
- Copies of passports of both of parents
- Copy of the accompanying person's valid visa in the provided cases
- Financial guarantees of one of the parents or legal guardians (sponsorship letter).
Please note:

## Visa Facilitation for family members of EU/EEA and Swiss Nationals
If you are a family member of an EU/EEA citizen (except Hungary) or Swiss citizen, your application will be processed quickly and free of charge, however, the service fee is applicable
                                                                        if the application is made at a visa service centre.
                                                                    
Family members under this category are:
- Spouse/partner/common law spouse
- The direct descendants (children) who are under the age of 21 or are dependents, and those of the spouse or partner.
- The dependent direct relatives in the ascending line (e.g. parents) and those of the spouse or partner.
Non-EU family member must include the following documents with their visa application:
- application form
- 1 passport sized photograph
- a valid passport and a hard copy of it
- a document proving family ties with the EU citizen (e.g. marriage certificate, birth certificate etc.) and dependency (if required)
- proof that the EU citizen is already living in the host country (if they are joining them)
- a declaration that the couple will travel together (if the family member will be accompanying the EU citizen)
* The European Union (EU) consists of 28 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta,
                                                                        Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden and the UK.
The European Economic Area (EEA) consists of 31 member states:
 Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta,
                                                                        Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and the United Kingdom.

## Photo Specifications
Customers are requested to submit their Application form in the new photo format, as explained below. 
General
- The photograph for each visa customer must be an un-mounted, full face photo, as displayed above
- The photograph must have been taken within the last six months.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa customer submitted must measure:
- 35 mm * 45 mm with the head centered in the frame.
- The head (measured from the top of the hair to the bottom of the chin) should measure about 3 cms
Photo Appearance
- The photograph must be a full-face front view in which the visa customer is facing the camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70 – 80 percent of the photo area.
- The photograph MUST be in color and have only a white background. Photos with dark, busy, or patterned backgrounds will not be accepted.
- General, the customer's head, including both face and hair, should be shown from the crown of the head to the tip of the chin on top and bottom and from hairline side-to-side. It
                                                                            is preferable that ears be exposed.

## Processing Time
Applications for short-term visas are usually processed within 15 days of receipt of documents by the Consulate General of Hungary in Almaty, if all necessary documents are in order (not
                                                                        including the day of submission at the Visa Center). However, in some cases, consideration of documents may take significantly longer.
The Consulate General of Hungary in Almaty may request additional documents to make a decision if necessary. Please note that the provision of all the above documents does not guarantee
                                                                        the issuance of a visa.
Carefully read the information provided on the web site. This information will allow you to prepare your documents properly. This will reduce the chances that your application will be
                                                                        considered longer or rejected due to improper preparation of documents.
